name: Iron Skin
description: Increase HP by 20 and raise your survivability.

name: Rage
description: Boost attack by 10 for the remainder of the battle.

name: Quick Feet
description: Increase speed by 5 to take turns sooner.

name: Full Heal
description: Restore 30 HP to the selected character.

name: Steel Guard
description: Grant +15 HP and a temporary shield for the next hit.

name: Surge
description: Boost speed by 8 and momentum for the next round.
